questionHtml: Hence, determine the total amount Tiffany will save, to the nearest dollar, by making the higher monthly payments.
markschemeHtml:
291×1300+874.84                    (M1)

379174.82

attempt to find difference between their value and their part (b)                    (M1)
416354-379174.82

37179 USD                    A1

Note: Accept 37180 USD from using the 2 dp. answer from part (b). Do not penalize for not rounding to nearest dollar if this has already been penalized in part (b).

[3 marks]
